subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Fashioner of the heavens, Sovereign over all names and Omnipotent over all things! I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا فاطر السماء و المهیمن علی الاسماء و المقتدر علی الاشیاء اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
